title: ContingentFeatureMarkers
description: Schema for morphological realizations contingent on multiple features.

source_path.description: The file path from which this config was loaded.

features.description: List of inflectional features this set expones.

global_stage.description: Allows specifying a default value for the 'stage' attribute.

global_markers.description: A marker or list of markers applied to all forms in this paradigm.

markers.description: An array over feature vectors and their realizations.

features.description: The feature value vector specified for this marker group.
